_comment: Rolepod hook config. Schema: https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli/blob/main/docs/hooks/index.md (verified 2026-05-10). Events used: SessionStart (context inject), BeforeTool (verify-first reminder), AfterTool (verify-after reminder on Edit/Write/replace).

SessionStart._comment: Lifecycle matcher = exact string per Gemini hooks spec. Pipe-separated covers all session start reasons.

hooks.name: rolepod-context-inject
hooks.description: Inject git log + hot files + rolepod gates reminder.

hooks.name: rolepod-verify-first
hooks.description: Remind verify-first: confirm facts before claiming.

hooks.name: rolepod-verify-after
hooks.description: Remind: every change ends with evidence (test / screenshot / curl / log).
